commands.review_summary:
The branch composes channel-supplied auto-reply `beforeDeliver` hooks with the canonical `reply_payload_sending` plus `message_sending` gates in both dispatcher entry points and adds regression tests for rewrite and veto behavior.

PR surface: Source +8, Tests +84. Total +92 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: current main and v2026.6.1 compose channel beforeDeliver only with reply_payload_sending while Telegram installs an identity beforeDeliver, so message_sending is skipped. I did not run tests because this review is read-only.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Human review should wait on live/equivalent channel proof and accept the delivery-gating behavior change; there is no narrow automated repair to apply.
